All Bell Locations

[...] you need to turn the rod counter clockwise to reveal the bell. After that, you can ring the bell to complete the quest.

### City of Delesyia

 
 
 - The bell in Delesyia can be found at the top of the clocktower in the capital of the city. The tower is easy to spot since there are wheels that are decorated on one side of the tower. Use Force Palm to propel yourself upwards, then enter through the window gaps to get inside.

### Replayability in Crimson Desert

 
 Replaying Crimson Desert allows you to experiment more in the second run. Such as causing more trouble around settlements, approaching combat differently, and more. However, since this is a new run, you will not have the items and skills obtained from your previous run, making the new run completely barebones.

### Crimson Desert Unarmed Duel: Boxing Minigame Notes, Tips & Trivia

 
 
 - You will complete the Challenge "Steel Fist" once you win 3 consecutive times.
 
 - Any of the playable Characters can participate in this minigame as long as you follow the rules of the game.
 
 - If you keep winning the Shot Contest: Gun minigame, the rewards (Currencies) you will acquire will increase.

### Hunting

 
 Another way to acquire the necessary materials to upgrade your equipment is through hunting. You can hunt any wildlife you find in the land of Pywel and acquire their body parts to enhance your equipment. Some of the wildlife in the game are elusive, so when hunting, make sure to carefully approach these animals so you can easily take them down.
